SELECT pno, category, mno, ptitle, pcontent, pregDate, pmodDate, pdelFlag, pdelFlagAdmin, ppersonal, ptotalPayment, pcalculated <<<<<<< HEAD FROM dutch.tbl_dutch WHERE pno = #{pno}
SELECT pno, category, mno, ptitle, pcontent, pregDate, pmodDate, pdelFlag, pdelFlagAdmin, ppersonal, ptotalPayment, pcalculated FROM dutch.tbl_dutch WHERE pno = #{pno}
SELECT nickname FROM dutch.tbl_member WHERE mno = #{mno}
SELECT mno, nickname, bank, bank_account, username, email, password, hp, cellphone, reg_date, mod_date, del_flag, login_type, gender, age, enabled FROM (SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC (a pk_mno) */ ROWNUM rn, a.* FROM dutch.tbl_member a WHERE
ROWNUM <= (#{pageNum} * #{rowAmountPerPage}) ) WHERE rn > = ((#{pageNum} * #{rowAmountPerPage}) - (#{rowAmountPerPage} - 1 ))
SELECT count(*) rowtotal FROM dutch.tbl_member
UPDATE dutch.tbl_dutch set ptitle = #{ptitle}, category = #{category} , pcontent = #{pcontent}, pmodDate = #{pmodDate}, ppersonal = #{ppersonal}, ptotalPayment = {ptotalPayment} where pno = #{pno}
delete from dutch.tbl_dutch where pno = #{pno}
update dutch.tbl_dutch set pdelFlagAdmin = #{pdelFlagAdmin} where pno = #{pno}
======= FROM dutch.tbl_dutch WHERE pno = #{pno}
